person.name: Henry de Wilington
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
He was born circa 1313-4, as he was aged 13 or 14 in 1327. He and wife Isabel had two sons and one daughter: John (knight), Thomas, Eleanor.

Sir Henry de Willington owned land at Umberleigh, Devonshire; Poulton, Gloucestershire; etc.

May 23, 1349-Sir Henry de Wylyngton died at Poulton, Gloucestershire, England. Sir Henry's uncle, Rainald de Wylyngton, was Henry's heir not Henry's son, John who was approximately 10 years old when Henry died. 

August 8, 1386-Widow Alianore de Wylyngton Daubeney's dower was ordered to be assigned. 

April 24, 1355-Rainald de Wylyngton, age 70, died, leaving Henry's son, John, age 15, his heir.

sourceList.title: Book - History of Town & Castle of Tamworth Stafford

zh.Sandhurst, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾桑德爾斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Wilington於大約1313年出生在英國戴文武波利時，他的父親Henry de Wilington45歲，母親Margaret Freville23歲。他於1337年與Isabel Whalesborough結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1349年5月23日在英國格盧斯特斯爾享年37歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.Sandhurst, Gloucestershire, England: 英国格盧斯特斯爾桑德爾斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Wilington于大约1313年出生在英国戴文武波利时，他的父亲Henry de Wilington45岁，母亲Margaret Freville23岁。他于1337年与Isabel Whalesborough结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1349年5月23日在英国格盧斯特斯爾享年37岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wilington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wigginton
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Rutland): habitational name from any of several places called Wigginton, in Staffordshire, Oxfordshire, Hertfordshire, and North Yorkshire. The Staffordshire, Oxfordshire, and Hertfordshire placenames derive from the Old English personal name Wicga (genitive Wicgan) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’ or the personal name Wicga + Old English connective -ing- + tūn. The North Yorkshire placename may derive from the Old Norse personal name Víkingr + Old English tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Wilington was born about 1313, in Umberleigh, Devon, England, his father, Henry de Wilington, was 45 and his mother, Margaret Freville, was 23. He married Isabel Whalesborough in 1337. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 23 May 1349, in Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 37, and was buried in Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Wilington est né environ 1313, à Umberleigh, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Wilington, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Margaret Freville, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Whalesborough en 1337. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 23 mai 1349, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Wilington um 1313 in Umberleigh, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Wilington 45 und seine Mutter Margaret Freville 23. Er hat 1337 Isabel Whalesborough geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Mai 1349 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Wilington è nato il circa 1313 nel Umberleigh, Devon, England, il suo padre, Henry de Wilington, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Freville, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Whalesborough nel 1337. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 maggio 1349, nel Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Wilingtonが約1313年にイギリスデボンウンバーレイグで生まれた時，父Henry de Wilingtonは45歳，母Margaret Frevilleは23歳であった。1337年にIsabel Whalesboroughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1349年5月23日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで37歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Wilington(이)가 대략 1313년 영국 데폰 벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Wilington(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Freville(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1337년 Isabel Whalesborough(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1349년 5월 23일 영국 그루스스터실르에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Wilington nasceu aproximadamente 1313, em Umberleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Wilington, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Freville, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Whalesborough em 1337. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de maio de 1349, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Wilington родился около 1313 г. в местности умбирлиг, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Wilington было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Freville, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Whalesborough в 1337 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 23 мая 1349 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Wilington nació aproximadamente 1313, en Umberleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Wilington, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Margaret Freville, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Isabel Whalesborough en 1337. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de mayo de 1349, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
